name: skill-maintainer
description: ⚠ MAINTAINERS ONLY — do NOT install into app projects; operates on a Claude skills/plugins marketplace repo itself. Issue-driven maintenance flow for that repo. Turns downstream bug reports (incorrect doctrine, skill gaps, plugin/hook bugs, packaging) into source-verified fixes and shipped releases: triage + label, a BLOCKING doctrine-verifier that checks every claim against source-of-truth before edits, component-specific fixers (skills vs plugin agents/commands/hooks), and a release-manager encoding independent component versioning + reproducible packaging + tag/release. Includes /skill-maintainer:setup-intake to scaffold GitHub issue templates + a label taxonomy so reports arrive triage-ready.
